altText: A whole redbud tree glowing pink at the edge of a field
A small redbud tree with pink flowers and a thin twisty trunk
Bright pink redbud flowers growing right out of a bare branch
Pink redbud flowers up close on a dark twig with blue sky behind
Lots of little pink flowers covering the redbud branches
Redbud branches turning pink with tiny spring flowers

Big heart shaped redbud leaves making cool shade
A shiny new redbud leaf shaped like a heart
